snippet: As part of the Victorian government’s cleaning reform, funding for quality improvements for government metropolitan and regional schools was introduced in 2025, specifically, to purchase additional cleaning services for one-off events. All metropolitan and regional schools will receive school cleaning additional funding each year. Exclusions: Schools/campuses with no history of previous SRP Cleaning payments are ineligible for this additional funding. The payments are based on an hourly rate for a 4-hour shift × 11, allowing for 44 additional hours of cleaning, or an extra event per month during the school year. For metropolitan and regional schools to purchase additional flexible funding for cleaning services for one off events such as school fetes or sporting events. Funding cannot be used for school maintenance activities such as gutter cleaning or swimming pool cleaning.
